batch_summary: On Thanksgiving, Joey, Ross, and Chandler watch football while Monica, Rachel, and Phoebe prepare dinner. During halftime, Joey suggests a three-on-three touch football game. Rachel eagerly joins despite having never played. Chandler, depressed over his breakup with Janice, is reluctantly persuaded by Joey to participate to even out the teams. However, when Joey invites Ross to join, Ross reveals that he and Monica are not supposed to play football.

The plan hits a mysterious snag when Joey invites Ross to play, and Ross reveals that he and his sister Monica are actually forbidden from playing football.

batch_summary: Ross and Monica explain that their mother banned them from football after "Geller Bowl VI," where Monica broke Ross's nose.
